languages.text: "Мне наскучило наблюдать за тем, как Себериан пытается вписать себя в эпоху, которой не принадлежит. Могу предположить, что тебе — тоже. Пришло время вернуть все на свои места: Патент окажется вновь в твоих владениях, а Себериан — в экспозиции Музеона. Все, что для этого надо сделать тебе — прибыть на территорию династии Йекхмет, что лежит по ту сторону пространственных врат, куда направляешься и ты. Координаты системы — уже в твоем сознании".

"I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."
languages.original_text: "Мне наскучило наблюдать за тем, как Себериан пытается вписать себя в эпоху, которой не принадлежит. Могу предположить, что тебе — тоже. Пришло время вернуть все на свои места: Патент окажется вновь в твоих владениях, а Себериан — в экспозиции Музеона. Все, что для этого надо сделать тебе — прибыть на территорию династии Йекхмет, что лежит по ту сторону пространственных врат, куда направляешься и ты. Координаты системы — уже в твоем сознании".

traits.locale_text: "I have grown weary of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant shall once again reside within your domain, and Seberian shall return to the Museon's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

languages.text: “看着塞贝里安硬要把自己塞进一个不属于他的时代，真让我厌烦。我猜你也有同感。是时候让一切回归正轨了。贸易授状会回到你的领地，而塞贝里安会回到陈列馆的展柜。你只需前往叶赫迈特王朝的领地，那领地就在你正要前往的那道空间门之外。那个星系的坐标已经印在你的脑海里了。”
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

traits.locale_text: “看着塞贝里安硬要把自己塞进一个不属于他的时代，真让我厌烦。我猜你也有同感。是时候让一切回归正轨了。贸易授状会回到你的领地，而塞贝里安会回到陈列馆的展柜。你只需前往叶赫迈特王朝的领地，那领地就在你正要前往的那道空间门之外。那个星系的坐标已经印在你的脑海里了。”

languages.text: «Me he cansado de ver a Seberian intentar vivir en una era que no le corresponde e imagino que tú también. Es hora de arreglar las cosas. La Patente volverá a tus dominios, y Seberian a la exposición del Museion. Solo tienes que viajar al espacio de la dinastía Yekhmet, más allá de la puerta espacial hacia la que te diriges. Ya tienes las coordenadas del sistema en tu mente».
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

traits.locale_text: «Me he cansado de ver a Seberian intentar vivir en una era que no le corresponde e imagino que tú también. Es hora de arreglar las cosas. La Patente volverá a tus dominios, y Seberian a la exposición del Museion. Solo tienes que viajar al espacio de la dinastía Yekhmet, más allá de la puerta espacial hacia la que te diriges. Ya tienes las coordenadas del sistema en tu mente».

languages.text: « Je suis las de voir Seberian tenter de se faire une place dans une époque qui n'est plus la sienne. J'imagine qu'il en va de même pour vous. Il est temps de rétablir l'ordre des choses. La lettre vous reviendra, et Seberian retrouvera sa place dans l'exposition du Muséion. Il vous suffit de vous rendre sur le territoire de la dynastie Yekhmet, qui se situe juste de l'autre côté du portail spatial vers lequel vous vous dirigez déjà. Les coordonnées du système sont déjà inscrites dans votre esprit. »
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis las de voir Seberian tenter de se faire une place dans une époque qui n'est plus la sienne. J'imagine qu'il en va de même pour vous. Il est temps de rétablir l'ordre des choses. La lettre vous reviendra, et Seberian retrouvera sa place dans l'exposition du Muséion. Les coordonnées du système sont déjà inscrites dans votre esprit. »

languages.text: "Seberian'ın kendisini ait olmadığı bir çağa sokmaya çalışmasını izlemekten sıkıldım. Sen de aynısını hissediyorsun sanırım. İşleri yoluna koymanın vakti geldi. Ruhsatname senin diyarına, Seberian ise Museion'daki sergisine dönecek. Tek yapman gereken, şu anda zaten yöneldiğin uzay geçidinin ötesinde bulunan Yekhmet hanedanlığının bölgesine seyahat etmek. Sistemin koordinatları zihninde mevcut."
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın kendisini ait olmadığı bir çağa sokmaya çalışmasını izlemekten sıkıldım. Sen de aynısını hissediyorsun sanırım. İşleri yoluna koymanın vakti geldi. Ruhsatname senin diyarına, Seberian ise Museion'daki sergisine dönecek. Tek yapman gereken, şu anda zaten yöneldiğin uzay geçidinin ötesinde bulunan Yekhmet hanedanlığının bölgesine seyahat etmek. Sistemin koordinatları zihninde mevcut."

languages.text: "Es langweilt mich mittlerweile, Seberian dabei zuzusehen, wie er versucht, in einem Zeitalter Fuß zu fassen, in das er nicht gehört. Ich nehme an, dir geht es ähnlich. Es wird Zeit, dass du die Sache wieder ins Lot bringst. Der Handelsbrief wird in dein Reich, Seberian in die Ausstellung des Museions zurückkehren. Du musst dazu nur in das Territorium der Yekhmet-Dynastie reisen, die sich jenseits des Raumtores befindet, zu dem du bereits unterwegs bist. Die Koordinaten des Systems sind schon in deinem Kopf."
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."

traits.locale_text: "Es langweilt mich mittlerweile, Seberian dabei zuzusehen, wie er versucht, in einem Zeitalter Fuß zu fassen, in das er nicht gehört. Ich nehme an, dir geht es ähnlich. Es wird Zeit, dass du die Sache wieder ins Lot bringst. Der Handelsbrief wird in dein Reich, Seberian in die Ausstellung des Museions zurückkehren. Du musst dazu nur in das Territorium der Yekhmet-Dynastie reisen, die sich jenseits des Raumtores befindet, zu dem du bereits unterwegs bist. Die Koordinaten des Systems sind schon in deinem Kopf."

languages.text: 「シベリアが属さない時代に入り込もうとする姿を見るのは飽きた。君もきっと同じ気持ちだろう。そろそろ事態を収束させる時だ。証書は君の領地に、シベリアはミュゼイオンの展示に戻される。君が向かうその空間の門の向こうにあるエフメト家の領地へ行くだけだ。システムの座標は君の心に既に刻まれている。」
languages.original_text: "I have grown bored of watching Seberian attempt to insert himself into an age to which he does not belong. I suspect you feel the same. It is time to set things right. The Warrant will return to your domain, and Seberian will return to the Museion's exhibition. All you need do is travel to the territory of the Yekhmet dynasty, which lies beyond the very spatial gate you are already heading toward. The system's coordinates are already within your mind."
